---
title: "Data Management in Stata"
source: "Workshop Material"
author: "Benjamin Jacobs"
institution: "University of Kansas"
competency: [Data Wrangling, Programming Skills, Data Engineering]
tech-lang: [Stata]
main-format: [PDF, Code, Data]
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

This workshop walks students through the application of data management techniques in a research environment. The focus is on best practices for downloading, transforming, merging, and saving data.

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/ku_Jacobs_Stata_Data_Management)

This Material is under the [CC BY license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en)
